ogTitle: Oakford vs Ocean Reef: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oakford and Ocean Reef.
heading: Oakford vs Ocean Reef — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oakford, Western Australia and Ocean Reef, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oakford has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Ocean Reef (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oakford or Ocean Reef safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oakford has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Ocean Reef scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oakford scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Ocean Reef scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oakford or Ocean Reef?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oakford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
